title: Laughing for a Good Cause
excerpt: In between editing videos, designing products and working on client pages, we decided to take a little laugh break and tested out the SunChips® Laughalizer -- it's a fun laugh-analyzing digital tool that highlights each user's unique "laugh-print" that can…
body:
In between editing videos, designing products and working on client pages, we decided to take a little laugh break and tested out the SunChips® Laughalizer -- it's a fun laugh-analyzing digital tool that highlights each user's unique "laugh-print" that can be shared across social media. After the Laughalizer carefully analyzed our laughs, it was determined that we sounded "charming!" 

We are working on sharing more behind the scenes content on our Facebook page, so if you haven't already please go ahead and "Like" Amy Tangerine to see more of the silly things we do in the (messy, but productive) studio!

This is a sponsored conversation written by me on behalf of Frito-Lay. The opinions and text are all mine.
